narrative:
Clayton City has 9,834 registered voters, with 53.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 25.7%, a modest Democratic lean of 4.3 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +4.2% D−R vs +2.0% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
